headline: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR): A High-Quality Infrastructure Stock with Superior Growth and Cash Flow
summary: Quality investing focuses on durable advantages and strong financials. Quanta Services (PWR) excels with 21.56% profit growth, 21.35% ROIC, and 129% cash conversion, making it a top long-term compounder.
